sections.label: + FEATURES
items: Added Summer Merchant support
Added Dynamic Potion Manager support
Added Summer Potions support
Added Defense support to Potion Manager
Added Sword Roll multi-select
Added Refill At Tokens setting for Sword Roll
Added dynamic Merchant support for new and future merchants

sections.label: - IMPROVEMENTS
items: Potion dropdown is now organized by stat and multiplier
Potion order is now cleaner: I, II, Summer
Defense can now use Potion Rules properly
Sword Passive was moved into its own tab
Summer Merchant items are now supported in Auto Buy

sections.label: - FIXES
items: Fixed new Summer Potions not appearing in Potion Manager
Fixed Potion Manager missing proper Defense activity support
Fixed Sword Roll only supporting one selected Sword Gacha
Fixed Summer Merchant not being available in the Shop system
Fixed some potion names appearing
Removed Auto Claim All Codes
Internal cleanup and improvements

sections.label: + FEATURES
items: Added activity adoption system for Raid, Gate, Defense and Trial
Added Trial adoption when Auto Trial is re-enabled inside an active Trial
Added Raid adoption when Auto Raid is re-enabled inside an active Raid
Added Gate adoption when Auto Gate is re-enabled inside an active Gate
Added Defense adoption when Auto Defense is re-enabled inside an active Defense
Added manual observing mode for active activities
Added Trial window consume system
Auto Trial now remembers completed/left Trials during the same entry window
Added faster activity resume after Raid, Gate, Trial and Defense transitions
Added responsive priority switching after activity completion

sections.label: - IMPROVEMENTS
items: Restored Trial movement inside active Time Trial
Auto Trial now properly moves to Trial mobs during rooms
Auto Trial no longer relies only on Click to hit nearby enemies
Improved Trial Auto Leave behavior
Improved Trial priority flow after Auto Leave
Auto Trial no longer re-enters the same Trial repeatedly while the portal is still open
Disabling Auto Trial inside a Trial now switches to manual observing instead of leaving
Re-enabling Auto Trial inside a selected Trial now adopts and continues it
Disabling Auto Raid inside a Raid now switches to manual observing instead of forcing exit
Re-enabling Auto Raid inside a selected Raid now adopts and continues it
Disabling Auto Gate inside a Gate now switches to manual observing instead of forcing exit
Re-enabling Auto Gate inside a selected Gate now adopts and continues it
Disabling Auto Defense inside a Defense now switches to manual observing instead of forcing exit
Re-enabling Auto Defense inside a selected Defense now adopts and continues it
Improved Gate entry flow before entering Gate
Gate now attempts to move to the correct world before entering
Reduced transition delays after Raid, Gate, Trial and Defense
Reduced scheduler delay for faster activity switching
Reduced Trial join retry delay
Reduced Trial world request delay
Reduced Raid and Defense start cooldowns
Improved responsiveness when moving from Trial to Clover, Raid, Gate or Crow
Improved responsiveness when chaining multiple Raid runs
Improved activity owner handling between hub-controlled and manual activities
Improved selected activity handling while already inside Raid, Gate, Defense or Trial

sections.label: - FIXES
items: Fixed Trial entering and stopping at room 1
Fixed Trial movement not running after the Auto Leave rework
Fixed Trial branch returning before calling MovementService step
Fixed Auto Leave Trial leaving correctly but immediately re-entering during the same open window
Fixed Auto Trial repeatedly leaving and re-entering until the Trial portal closed
Fixed Auto Trial toggle off calling leave when it should only stop controlling
Fixed Trial Auto Leave potentially affecting manual Trial ownership
Fixed Trial leave request trying to take ownership of manual Trials
Fixed Trial movement not clearing correctly when switching to manual observing
Fixed selected Trial changes not properly adopting or unadopting the current Trial
Fixed Gate showing Entering but not moving to the Gate world first
Fixed Gate requiring manual world change before entry could continue
Fixed excessive delay after leaving Raid before starting the next priority activity
Fixed excessive delay after Trial before returning to Clover, Raid, Gate or Crow
Fixed excessive delay between repeated Raid runs
Fixed activity transitions staying too long in Returning or hold states
Fixed pending Trial leave cleanup in manual and adoption flows
Fixed several owner and manual observing edge cases for Raid, Gate, Trial and Defense
Internal activity stability improvements

sections.label: + FEATURES
items: Added Time Trial Medium support
Auto Trial now supports multiple Trial selections
Added multi-select dropdown for Auto Trial
Auto Trial now supports Easy and Medium together
Added Time Trial Medium support to Priority
Added Time Trial Medium support to Auto Leave

sections.label: - IMPROVEMENTS
items: Improved Auto Trial detection
Auto Trial can now detect which Trial is currently open
Improved Trial scheduling
Improved Trial priority handling
Improved Defense stability
Improved Defense priority detection

sections.label: - FIXES
items: Fixed Auto Trial only supporting one Trial at a time
Fixed Trial detection for the new Time Trial system
Fixed Defense context detection
Fixed Defense activity recognition in Priority
Internal cleanup and stability improvements

sections.label: - IMPROVEMENTS
items: Improved Auto Raid
Improved Raid/Gate/Defense stability
Improved Time Trial
Improved Auto Attack
Improved World Gacha
World Gacha can now skip gachas with low tokens and resume them later
World Gacha can now switch back to higher priority gachas when enough tokens are reached
FPS Cap now starts enabled by default
FPS Cap Unfocused now starts enabled by default

items: Fixed World Gacha, Sword Passive and Grimoire targets not showing correctly
Fixed Auto Leave
Fixed stuck raid issue
Fixed Raid/Gate list sometimes not loading correctly
Fixed World Gacha token wait showing wrong refill value
Removed old teleport-back system
Crow now collects Crow immediately when found
Code optimizations and internal cleanup
